events.name: Tomorrowland
events.description: The world's most spectacular electronic music festival, transforming the fields of Boom into a fairytale realm of immersive stages, pyrotechnics and pounding bass for hundreds of thousands of dancers.

quotes.lyrics_body: Hands to the ceiling, we set the night on fire / every drop a heartbeat climbing higher
Underground and out of sight / we move like shadows through the strobe-lit night
Let the current carry us slow / nowhere to be but here in the glow

events.name: Glastonbury Festival
events.description: The legendary five-day pilgrimage on Worthy Farm — a sprawling city of stages, where rock royalty, pop icons and surprise sets unfold across the rolling Somerset countryside.

quotes.lyrics_body: Sing it loud till the rafters shake / we are the noise that the silence makes
I folded all my fear into a paper heart / and let it sail to wherever you are
Pour the morning into something bright / we'll start a little riot in the light

events.name: Montreux Jazz Festival
events.description: An intimate lakeside institution on the shores of Lake Geneva, where jazz legends and genre-blurring newcomers play under soft light to a crowd that came to listen.

quotes.lyrics_body: Brushed snare and a quiet room / the night unwinds in a minor blue
Every note a little ache / a tender thing I won't let break
Let the chords just float away / nowhere to go but where they may

events.name: Primavera Sound
events.description: Barcelona's cooler-than-thou seaside festival, balancing pop megastars, electronic auteurs and guitar bands across a sun-and-sea backdrop that runs deep into the night.

quotes.lyrics_body: City lights in stereo / we glow wherever the night will go
Breathe in slow, let the bassline drift / the night's a gift, no need to lift
Kick the doors of summer wide / we're the spark the small towns hide

events.name: Sónar Barcelona
events.description: A festival of advanced music and creative technology — daytime ideas, nighttime warehouse rave, where cutting-edge electronic acts push sound and light to their limits.

quotes.lyrics_body: Steel and smoke in a four-four pulse / the floor is church, the bass absolves
Numbers fall like quiet rain / a phantom signal in my brain
Count it down, let the whole thing blow / a thousand hands in the undertow

events.name: Rock am Ring
events.description: Germany's thunderous rock institution at the Nürburgring — three days of riffs, mosh pits and bonfire camaraderie for tens of thousands of devoted fans.

quotes.lyrics_body: Strike the match and let it roar / we don't live quiet anymore
Down where the cold light never goes / I carry thunder in my bones
Throw your fists at the open sky / we were never built to sit and die

events.name: Lollapalooza Chicago
events.description: A four-day downtown blowout in Grant Park, where rock, pop, hip-hop and dance share the skyline and the city itself becomes the backdrop.

quotes.lyrics_body: I was born to burn out loud / a supernova in the crowd
Skyline cold but the grind stay warm / came from nothing, built a storm
Turn it up till the speakers cry / we are the loud that won't say goodbye

events.name: Newport Jazz Festival
events.description: The historic seaside gathering at Fort Adams — where the masters of jazz and a new generation of improvisers trade ideas with the Atlantic at their backs.

quotes.lyrics_body: Salt on the breeze and a walking bass / the evening keeps an easy pace
I keep the words I never said / folded soft beneath the thread
Let the rhythm take the slow way home / a gentle groove to call our own

events.name: Osheaga
events.description: Montreal's island festival on Parc Jean-Drapeau — a bilingual, genre-hopping celebration of pop, indie and dance with the city's skyline shimmering across the water.

quotes.lyrics_body: Windows down on a slow coast road / nowhere to be, no heavy load
Lift the room a little higher / hands like sparks above the wire
Chasing colors through the cold / a northern light we'll never hold

events.name: Rolling Loud Miami
events.description: The flagship of hip-hop festivals — Hard Rock Stadium grounds turned into a humid, sub-rattling congregation of the genre's biggest names and hungriest newcomers.

quotes.lyrics_body: Count the scars like they're a map / every wrong turn led me back
Heavy is the head, still I wear it proud / queen of my block, say it loud
Grandma's prayers in a minor key / still the realest thing to me

events.name: Aurora Lake — Neon Hearts Tour
events.description: An arena-scale pop spectacle from one of the genre's most emotionally fearless performers, blending stadium choruses with confessional ballads.

quotes.lyrics_body: We wore our hearts like neon signs / glowing loud through the hardest times
Watch me dance on the breaking glass / nothing about tonight will last

events.name: Ironwidow — Live in Berlin
events.description: A monolithic, smoke-and-strobe metal show in a converted power station, built for the faithful who want it loud, heavy and uncompromising.

quotes.lyrics_body: Down where the cold light never goes / I carry thunder in my bones

events.name: Marcus Vale — Citylights Set
events.description: An intimate, late-night hip-hop showcase in a downtown theatre, trading stadium bombast for storytelling, live band textures and after-dark mood.

quotes.lyrics_body: Wrote my mama every line I earned / a hundred lessons, every bridge I burned
Skyline cold but the grind stay warm / came from nothing, built a storm

events.name: The Blue Mensch Quartet
events.description: A smoky, late-set jazz residency in a historic French Quarter club — brushed drums, upright bass and a sound that feels like 2am in the best possible way.

quotes.lyrics_body: The room hums low and the lights go dim / let the bass walk slow, let the night begin

events.name: NOVASYNTH (DJ Set)
events.description: A warehouse rave with a single mission: peak-time euphoria. Wall-to-wall lasers, a relentless build, and a crowd that doesn't sit down.

quotes.lyrics_body: Past the point of no return / let the whole sky burn

events.name: Linnea Frost — Acoustic Evening
events.description: A hushed, candlelit pop performance stripped back to voice and piano — the kind of show where the whole room holds its breath.

quotes.lyrics_body: Soft as the snow on a streetlamp's glow / I'll love you slow, I'll love you slow
